title: Claude Code Plugin Manifest (dotnet-ai-kit)
description: Schema for .claude-plugin/plugin.json under the plugin-native architecture (feature 019). All field names match Claude Code's documented plugin manifest reference (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference). Capabilities not documented for Claude Code MUST NOT appear here (per spec FR-002).

agents.description: Per spec FR-026: each logical specialist agent has a Claude-generated file under agents-claude/. The legacy AGENT_FRONTMATTER_MAP is deleted (architecture-phase R1).

mcpServers.description: After commit 12: csharp-ls removed; codebase-memory-mcp retained.

lspServers.description: Per spec FR-028: C# language intelligence exposed through host's language-server primitive after commit 11. Per Codex round-1 critique: schema tightened — unknown LSP names rejected without explicit registration.

csharp-lsp.description: References the official csharp-lsp plugin dependency declared in `dependencies`. Requires csharp-ls binary on PATH (verified by `dotnet-ai check` per CHK009).

outputStyles.description: Unused in v1; reserved per the host's documented manifest reference.

dependencies.description: Per commit 11: csharp-lsp plugin dependency added. Must contain csharp-lsp.
